name: tanstack-ssr
description: Module Federation Vite + TanStack Start with full SSR support

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter tanstack-ssr-shared build && pnpm --filter tanstack-ssr-remote dev & pnpm --filter tanstack-ssr-host dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter tanstack-ssr-shared build && pnpm --filter tanstack-ssr-remote build && pnpm --filter tanstack-ssr-host build
